summaries.title: Systematic Telegram gap analysis — implement all 26 gaps across 6 phases
summaries.summary: When implementing a large batch of features across multiple files, create a regression test suite early to catch export mismatches and missing function references, as it caught 10 missing exports and 3 constant name mismatches in the first run. For any multi-file feature implementation, validate that all expected functions are exported, all expected constants exist, and all expected source code patterns are present before deployment.
